messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a python-pptx script for a 10-slide colorful educational presentation on Introduction to Data Science aimed at University Students. Include icons and engaging visual placeholders. Save as "Data_Science_101.pptx". The entire presentation must be in French using a 4:3 Standard orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os

# --- Deck Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(8)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(6)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Data_Science_101.pptx"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

# Color palette — vibrant educational colors
COLOR_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x25, 0x63, 0xEB)       # Blue
COLOR_SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x7C, 0x3A, 0xED)      # Purple
COLOR_SUCCESS = RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81)         # Green
COLOR_WARNING = RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0x0B)         # Orange
COLOR_DANGER = RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44)          # Red
COLOR_TEAL = RGBColor(0x14, 0xB8, 0xA6)            # Teal
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF3, 0xF4, 0xF6)
COLOR_DARK = RGBColor(0x1F, 0x29, 0x37)
COLOR_MID_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x72, 0x80)

# Fonts
FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

# --- Helper Functions ---

def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    """Convert a hex color string to RGBColor."""
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, bg_hex):
    """Set the background fill of a slide."""
    from pptx.oxml.ns import qn
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    """Add a text box to the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, icon_char="◆", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE):
    """Add a styled card with title, body text, and an icon placeholder."""
    # Card background
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    # Icon placeholder (circle with character)
    icon_size = Inches(0.45)
    icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + Inches(0.12), top + Inches(0.12), icon_size, icon_size)
    icon_shape.fill.solid()
    icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    icon_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.6), top + Inches(0.12), width - Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = icon_char + "  " + title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Body text
    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.6), top + Inches(0.45), width - Inches(0.8), height - Inches(0.5))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body
    run_body.font.size = Pt(10)
    run_body.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    """Add a decorative section label with underline."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, Inches(7), Inches(0.35), text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position + Inches(0.32), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    """Add a footer with slide number."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.6), Inches(7), Inches(0.25), f"Page {page_number}", font_size=9, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, label):
    """Add an image if it exists, otherwise a styled placeholder."""
    # Placeholder rectangle with icon and label
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xD1, 0xD5, 0xDB)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    # Icon placeholder (circle with plus sign)
    icon_size = Inches(0.6)
    icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + (width - icon_size) / 2, top + Inches(0.3), icon_size, icon_size)
    icon_shape.fill.solid()
    icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    icon_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xD1, 0xD5, 0xDB)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + height - Inches(0.35), width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.25), label, font_size=8, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_icon_circle(slide, left, top, size, char, bg_color):
    """Add a colored circle with an icon character."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.05), top + Inches(0.08), size - Inches(0.1), size - Inches(0.16), char, font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_numbered_step(slide, left, top, width, height, number, title_text, body_text):
    """Add a numbered step card."""
    # Step background
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

    # Number circle
    num_size = Inches(0.4)
    num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), num_size, num_size)
    num_shape.fill.solid()
    num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    num_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.12), top + Inches(0.13), num_size - Inches(0.04), num_size - Inches(0.06), str(number), font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Title
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.25), title_text, font_size=11, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Body
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.38), width - Inches(0.7), height - Inches(0.45), body_text, font_size=9, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY)


# --- Slide Builder Functions ---

def slide_01_title(prs):
    """Slide 1: Title Slide — Introduction à la Science des Données"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1E3A8A")

    # Decorative circles
    add_icon_circle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(1.2), "◆", COLOR_SECONDARY)
    add_icon_circle(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.0), "●", COLOR_TEAL)
    add_icon_circle(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.6), "▲", COLOR_WARNING)

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(7), Inches(1.2))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Introduction à la"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Science des Données"
    run2.font.size = Pt(48)
    run2.font.bold = True
    run2.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    run2.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), "Cours Universitaire — Fondamentaux et Applications", font_size=18, color=COLOR_TEAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Decorative line
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(3), Pt(4))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WARNING
    line.line.fill.background()

    # Bottom info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.2), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), "📊 10 Slides • Niveau Universitaire", font_size=14, color=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_definition(prs):
    """Slide 2: Qu'est-ce que la Science des Données?"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    # Title
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Qu'est-ce que la Science des Données?"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Decorative accent bar
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Définition", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    # Definition card
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.6), Inches(6.6), Inches(2.8), "Définition",
             "La science des données est un domaine interdisciplinaire qui combine les statistiques, l'informatique et la connaissance du domaine pour extraire des informations significatives à partir de données structurées et non structurées.",
             icon_char="📊", bg_color=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY)

    # Key points card
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.1), Inches(1.2), "Objectifs Clés",
             "• Analyser des données\n• Identifier des tendances\n• Prendre des décisions éclairées",
             icon_char="🎯", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE)

    # Related fields card
    add_card(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.1), Inches(1.2), "Domaines Connexes",
             "• Intelligence Artificielle\n• Machine Learning\n• Big Data",
             icon_char="🔗", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_03_why_learn(prs):
    """Slide 3: Pourquoi Apprendre la Data Science?"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Pourquoi Apprendre la Data Science?"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Les Raisons Principales", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    # 4 cards in 2x2 grid
    card_w = Inches(3.0)
    card_h = Inches(1.8)
    gap_x = Inches(0.35)
    gap_y = Inches(0.35)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    start_y = Inches(1.7)

    cards_data = [
        ("Demande Croissante", "Le marché de la data science croît de 25% par an dans le monde.", COLOR_PRIMARY, "📈"),
        ("Salaire Attractif", "Les data scientists sont parmi les professionnels les mieux rémunérés.", COLOR_SUCCESS, "💰"),
        ("Impact Réel", "Applications dans la santé, finance, transport et bien plus encore.", COLOR_TEAL, "🌍"),
        ("Compétences Transférables", "Statistiques, programmation et pensée analytique.", COLOR_WARNING, "🧠"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body, color, icon) in enumerate(cards_data):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = start_y + row * (card_h + gap_y)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, title, body, icon_char=icon, bg_color=color)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_process(prs):
    """Slide 4: Les Étapes du Processus"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Les Étapes du Processus Data Science"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Cycle de Vie d'un Projet", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    steps = [
        ("1", "Collecte des Données", "Rassembler les données depuis diverses sources"),
        ("2", "Nettoyage", "Supprimer les valeurs manquantes et corriger les erreurs"),
        ("3", "Exploration (EDA)", "Analyser les distributions et corrélations"),
        ("4", "Modélisation", "Appliquer des algorithmes de ML ou statistiques"),
        ("5", "Déploiement", "Intégrer le modèle dans un système de production"),
    ]

    step_w = Inches(1.2)
    step_h = Inches(2.0)
    start_x = Inches(0.4)
    start_y = Inches(1.8)

    for i, (num, title_text, body_text) in enumerate(steps):
        x = start_x + i * (step_w + Inches(0.15))
        add_numbered_step(slide, x, start_y, step_w, step_h, num, title_text, body_text)

    # Arrow connectors between steps
    for i in range(len(steps) - 1):
        arrow_x = start_x + (i + 1) * (step_w + Inches(0.15)) - Inches(0.12)
        arrow_y = start_y + step_h / 2 - Inches(0.1)
        arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, arrow_x, arrow_y, Inches(0.24), Inches(0.2))
        arrow.fill.solid()
        arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
        arrow.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_tools(prs):
    """Slide 5: Outils et Technologies"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Outils et Technologies"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Écosystème des Outils", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    tools_data = [
        ("Python", "Langage principal pour la data science", COLOR_DANGER, "🐍"),
        ("R", "Statistiques et visualisation avancée", COLOR_SUCCESS, "📊"),
        ("SQL", "Gestion des bases de données relationnelles", COLOR_TEAL, "🗄️"),
        ("Tableau", "Visualisation interactive de données", COLOR_WARNING, "📈"),
        ("TensorFlow", "Deep Learning et réseaux neuronaux", COLOR_PRIMARY, "🧠"),
        ("Pandas", "Manipulation efficace des données", COLOR_SECONDARY, "🐼"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.0)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap_x = Inches(0.3)
    gap_y = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    start_y = Inches(1.7)

    for i, (title, body, color, icon) in enumerate(tools_data):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = start_y + row * (card_h + gap_y)

        # Card background with colored top accent
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

        # Top colored bar
        accent = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, Inches(0.12))
        accent.fill.solid()
        accent.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        accent.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.5), y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), icon + "  " + title, font_size=12, bold=True, color=color)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.5), y + Inches(0.8), card_w - Inches(0.7), card_h - Inches(0.9), body, font_size=9, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_applications(prs):
    """Slide 6: Domaines d'Application"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Domaines d'Application"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Où la Data Science Transforme le Monde", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    apps_data = [
        ("Santé & Médecine", "Diagnostic assisté, découverte de médicaments, analyse d'images médicales.", COLOR_DANGER, "🏥"),
        ("Finance", "Détection de fraude, scoring crédit, trading algorithmique.", COLOR_SUCCESS, "💳"),
        ("Transport", "Navigation autonome, optimisation logistique, gestion du trafic.", COLOR_TEAL, "🚗"),
        ("Commerce", "Recommandations produits, analyse comportementale, pricing dynamique.", COLOR_WARNING, "🛒"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.2)
    card_h = Inches(1.8)
    gap_x = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(0.5)
    start_y = Inches(1.7)

    for i, (title, body, color, icon) in enumerate(apps_data):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = start_y + row * (card_h + Inches(0.3))

        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

        # Icon circle
        add_icon_circle(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.2), Inches(0.6), icon, color)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.85), y + Inches(0.2), card_w - Inches(1.0), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=color)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.85), y + Inches(0.65), card_w - Inches(1.0), card_h - Inches(0.75), body, font_size=10, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_07_concepts(prs):
    """Slide 7: Concepts Fondamentaux"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Concepts Fondamentaux"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Les Piliers de la Data Science", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    concepts_data = [
        ("Machine Learning", "Algorithmes qui apprennent à partir de données pour faire des prédictions sans programmation explicite.", COLOR_PRIMARY, "🤖"),
        ("Intelligence Artificielle", "Domaine plus large incluant le raisonnement, la perception et la prise de décision autonome.", COLOR_SECONDARY, "🧠"),
        ("Big Data", "Ensembles de données massifs nécessitant des outils spécialisés pour le stockage et l'analyse.", COLOR_TEAL, "💾"),
        ("Statistiques", "Fondement mathématique de l'inférence, de la probabilité et de l'analyse de données.", COLOR_WARNING, "📐"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.2)
    card_h = Inches(1.8)
    gap_x = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(0.5)
    start_y = Inches(1.7)

    for i, (title, body, color, icon) in enumerate(concepts_data):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = start_y + row * (card_h + Inches(0.3))

        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

        # Colored top bar
        accent = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, Inches(0.12))
        accent.fill.solid()
        accent.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        accent.line.fill.background()

        add_icon_circle(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), icon, color)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.85), y + Inches(0.2), card_w - Inches(1.0), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=color)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.85), y + Inches(0.7), card_w - Inches(1.0), card_h - Inches(0.8), body, font_size=10, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_08_skills(prs):
    """Slide 8: Compétences Requises"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Compétences Requises"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Compétences Clés pour un Data Scientist", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    skills_data = [
        ("Programmation Python", 90, COLOR_DANGER),
        ("Statistiques & Probabilités", 85, COLOR_SUCCESS),
        ("Visualisation de Données", 80, COLOR_TEAL),
        ("Machine Learning", 75, COLOR_WARNING),
        ("Bases de Données (SQL)", 70, COLOR_PRIMARY),
        ("Communication & Storytelling", 65, COLOR_SECONDARY),
    ]

    label_w = Inches(2.8)
    bar_start_x = Inches(3.4)
    bar_max_width = Inches(3.5)
    start_y = Inches(1.7)
    row_height = Inches(0.6)

    for i, (skill_name, proficiency, color) in enumerate(skills_data):
        y = start_y + i * row_height

        # Skill name label
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, label_w, Inches(0.3), skill_name, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

        # Background bar
        bg_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, bar_start_x, y + Inches(0.15), bar_max_width, Inches(0.3))
        bg_bar.fill.solid()
        bg_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        bg_bar.line.fill.background()

        # Filled bar
        fill_w = Inches(bar_max_width.inches * proficiency / 100)
        fill_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, bar_start_x, y + Inches(0.15), fill_w, Inches(0.3))
        fill_bar.fill.solid()
        fill_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        fill_bar.line.fill.background()

        # Percentage label
        add_text_box(slide, bar_start_x + bar_max_width + Inches(0.1), y, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), f"{proficiency}%", font_size=11, bold=True, color=color)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def slide_09_careers(prs):
    """Slide 9: Perspectives de Carrière"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Perspectives de Carrière"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
                run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Carrières et Salaires Moyens", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.38), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    # Career list on left
    careers_left = [
        "Data Scientist",
        "Data Analyst",
        "ML Engineer",
        "Data Engineer",
        "Chief Data Officer",
    ]

    for i, career in enumerate(careers_left):
        y = Inches(1.7) + i * Inches(0.5)
        add_icon_circle(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.1), y, Inches(0.3), "●", COLOR_PRIMARY)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.45), y, Inches(2.8), Inches(0.35), career, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Chart on right — using XL_CHART_TYPE (NOT ChartType)
    chart_data = []
    categories = ["Data Scientist", "ML Engineer", "Data Analyst", "Data Engineer", "CDO"]
    salaries = [75000, 95000, 65000, 85000, 120000]

    chart_data_series = []
    for cat, sal in zip(categories, salaries):
        chart_data_series.append((cat, sal))

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data_obj = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data_obj.categories = categories
    chart_data_obj.add_series("Salaire Moyen (€)", salaries)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(4.0), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.8),
        chart_data_obj
    )

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Salaire (€)"
    value_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    category_axis = chart.category_axis
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    # Growth stat box at bottom
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.0), "Croissance du Secteur",
             "+35% de créations d'emplois en 5 ans\n+28% de demande mondiale",
             icon_char="📈", bg_color=COLOR_SUCCESS)

    add_card(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(4.7), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.0), "Taux d'Insertion",
             "95% des diplômés en data science\ntrouvent un emploi en 6 mois",
             icon_char="🎓", bg_color=COLOR_TEAL)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def slide_10_conclusion(prs):
    """Slide 10: Conclusion et Ressources"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1E3A8A")

    # Decorative circles
    add_icon_circle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.0), "◆", COLOR_SECONDARY)
    add_icon_circle(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.7), "●", COLOR_TEAL)

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(7), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Conclusion et Ressources"
    run.font.size = Pt(32)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Summary card
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(7), Inches(1.8), "Résumé",
             "La science des données est un domaine en pleine expansion qui combine statistiques, programmation et expertise métier pour transformer les données en insights actionnables.",
             icon_char="📝", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE)

    # Resources section
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.4), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), "Ressources pour Continuer", font_size=18, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.75), Inches(2.0), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
    line.line.fill.background()

    resources_data = [
        ("📚 Livres", "Python for Data Analysis — W. McKinney"),
        ("💻 Plateformes", "Kaggle, Coursera, edX"),
        ("🔧 Outils", "Jupyter, Google Colab, VS Code"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(resources_data):
        y = Inches(3.95) + i * Inches(0.45)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_WARNING)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), y, Inches(4.8), Inches(0.35), body, font_size=11, color=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY)

    # Thank you message
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(6), Inches(0.4), "Merci de votre attention ! 🙏", font_size=20, bold=True, color=COLOR_WARNING, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


# --- Main Function ---
def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_definition(prs)
    slide_03_why_learn(prs)
    slide_04_process(prs)
    slide_05_tools(prs)
    slide_06_applications(prs)
    slide_07_concepts(prs)
    slide_08_skills(prs)
    slide_09_careers(prs)
    slide_10_conclusion(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
